message:
test(unit): expand wavelet_tree.rs inline tests from 16 to 38 (+22) (ft-36zwq)

Cover rank/select consistency, rank monotonicity, rank sum-to-pos
invariant, range_count additivity, quantile sorted output, full byte
range (0..=255), nonexistent symbols, empty/boundary ranges, subrange
frequencies, serde query preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
